ModDescription: Reworks 5 redundant single-cure consumables (Antidote, Eye Drops, Echo Herbs, Maiden's Kiss, Gold Needle) into offensive status grenades the Chemist throws with the Item command: Venom Flask (Poison), Smoke Bomb (Blind), Hush Vial (Silence), Oil Flask (Oil), and Sludge Bomb (Slow). Remedy still covers every status, so no curing is lost; it moves to Chapter 1 so early status-healing stays available. Data-only.
